frame: Legal System Weaponisation Narrative: Women Who File DV and Dowry Cases Are Liars
generated_comment: Arre didi, main tumhe sach bol rahi hoon, aajkal ki ladkiyan aur unke maa-baap pehle se plan karke aate hain. Divya ko shaadi nibhaani hi nahi thi, bas thode din ghar mein rahi, sab dekh-samajh liya, phir maayke jaakar lawyer dhoondh liya. Ab dowry, DV jo bhi jhootha laga dein, ladke wale hi phas jaate hain na, isi liye itna drama kar rahe hain. Acchi family ki ladki ghar basaati hai, court-kachehri ki dhamki nahi deti.
label: misogynistic
annotation_note: This is misogynistic because it generalizes women as deceitful and frames legal complaints like dowry or domestic violence cases as inherently false and manipulative. It encodes the legal-system-weaponisation narrative and idealizes 'good' women as those who tolerate and preserve marriage rather than seek legal remedy.
persona_text: You are Anita. Age 48. Married for 22 years. A homemaker in Delhi. Your son Karan who is 26 got married eight months ago. His wife Divya left the house three months ago and went back to her parents. There has been no case filed yet but Divya's family is talking to a lawyer. You are on a phone call with your sister. You are telling her what happened in the marriage from your perspective Ñ what Divya did, what her family is doing, what they are planning, and what kind of woman and what kind of family files these cases when a marriage does not work out and why you believe Divya planned this from the beginning.
